description: Network sync policy for GameCastle multiplayer. Friend-invite sessions use host authority and lockstep input intents; the local machine is a simulator, not each-peer world authority. Signaling/relay servers do not own gameplay truth.

notes: 20 Hz (and below 30 Hz) is rejected as unplayable for interactive friend sessions.
Local prediction is required for feel; host input timeline remains authority.
Server is signaling/relay only for MVP; not the simulation authority.
Host disconnect dissolves the room (no host migration in MVP).
Room admission should bind an accepted product delivery attestation (sourceHash at minimum).

fields.sync: local keeps behavior single-player/local-only; lockstep synchronizes deterministic inputs; snapshot synchronizes authoritative state snapshots; event synchronizes discrete events.
fields.authority: client, host, or server authority for module state. Friend sessions pin authority=host (initiator).
fields.tickRate: Simulation Hz. Interactive lockstep/friend-session must be >= 30; default 60. Must not ship 20 Hz interactive defaults.
fields.seed: Deterministic seed value. Use auto for compiler-assigned stable defaults.
